# shadcn/ui primitives

This folder is populated by the shadcn CLI in Phase 2:

```bash
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init
pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add button input label form dialog select card sonner badge
```

**Do not edit these files in Phase 2.** Restyle via `className` from consumers. See §2.12 and ADR-0013.
